docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOULAS, VASSILIKI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DAVID YU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VASSILIKI MOULAS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MOULAS, VASSILIKI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOULAS, VASSILIKI $6,265.07 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,380.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,355.01 FILED BY YU, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT MOULAS, VASSILIKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
